title: Chief Sustainability Officers
description: Communicate and coordinate with management, shareholders, customers, and employees to address sustainability issues. Enact or oversee a corporate sustainability strategy.

tasks.text: Monitor and evaluate effectiveness of sustainability programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop or execute strategies to address issues such as energy use, resource conservation, recycling, pollution reduction, waste elimination, transportation, education, and building design.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, or oversee the development of, sustainability evaluation or monitoring systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise employees or volunteers working on sustainability projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop sustainability reports, presentations, or proposals for supplier, employee, academia, media, government, public interest, or other groups.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, or oversee the development of, marketing or outreach media for sustainability projects or events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and evaluate pilot projects or programs to enhance the sustainability research agenda.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Create and maintain sustainability program documents, such as schedules and budgets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Formulate or implement sustainability campaign or marketing strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research environmental sustainability issues, concerns, or stakeholder interests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct sustainability program operations to ensure compliance with environmental or governmental regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate and approve proposals for sustainability projects, considering factors such as cost effectiveness, technical feasibility, and integration with other initiatives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop methodologies to assess the viability or success of sustainability initiatives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review sustainability program objectives, progress, or status to ensure compliance with policies, standards, regulations, or laws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Write and distribute financial or environmental impact reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write project proposals, grant applications, or other documents to pursue funding for environmental initiatives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify educational, training, or other development opportunities for sustainability employees or volunteers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct risk assessments related to sustainability and the environment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
